name: supercompute
description: QUANTA - Sovereign Compute Platform on Base Chain

scripts.deploy: npm run sync && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=supercompute --commit-dirty=true
scripts.sync: cp Supercompute.html public/index.html && mkdir -p public/site && cp -r site/* public/site/ 2>/dev/null; SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo dev) && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo local) && STAMP=$(date +'%H:%M') && sed -i.bak "s|__VERSION__|$BRANCH @ $SHA · $STAMP|g" public/index.html && rm public/index.html.bak && cp sc.css public/sc.css && cp sc-app.jsx public/sc-app.jsx && cp sc-shared.jsx public/sc-shared.jsx && cp sc-landing.jsx public/sc-landing.jsx && cp sc-flows.js public/sc-flows.js && cp sc-logic.js public/sc-logic.js && cp tweaks-panel.jsx public/tweaks-panel.jsx && echo "Synced files to public/ · version: $BRANCH @ $SHA · $STAMP"
